summary: Added a generated-art Comms Command Room to each lane Comms view so bot handoff, local drafts, thread context, gates, and command urgency are visible before staging anything.

generated_asset.prompt_summary: Premium dark sci-fi lane Comms command room with bot terminal, local draft queue capsules, thread conduits, teal/amber/green glows, no text, no logos, and no characters.

ui_contract: Render a Comms Command Room at the top of every lane Comms view.
Use generated comms-command-room-20260618.png as the reusable bot command-room backdrop.
Derive owner portrait, lane status, staged queue count, local dispatch history, blocker count, urgency, thread context, and target specialty from existing snapshot/browser-local state.
Expose Q, C, and PATH controls through existing local-only staging, copy, and detail-view handlers.
Register the command-room texture in the Visual Asset Vault system assets.
Keep animation transform/opacity-based and covered by reduced-motion handling.

red_green.red: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_comms_command_room.py -q failed before implementation on missing commsCommandRoomStats.
red_green.green: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_comms_command_room.py -q passed after generated asset, renderer, styles, docs, cache token, and Asset Vault wiring.

responsive.evidence: All checked viewports rendered the Comms Command Room with generated backdrop, owner avatar, five stats, three local actions, zero bad rects, zero button text overflow, zero page horizontal overflow, and zero console errors.
